scripts.dev:pages: npm run config:sync:d1 && wrangler pages dev public --compatibility-date=2026-02-23
scripts.dev:worker: npm run config:sync:d1 && wrangler dev workers/crawler/src/index.ts --config workers/crawler/wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:local: npm run config:sync:d1 && wrangler d1 migrations apply techscope --local --config wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: npm run config:sync:d1 && wrangler d1 migrations apply techscope --remote --config wrangler.toml
